kart_detay_aciklama:
At Umut Design and Urban Equipment, we are committed to maintaining the highest level of customer satisfaction, continuously improving the quality of our products and services, and ensuring full compliance with international standards. Our quality policy is shaped by the following fundamental principles at every stage of our business processes:

Customer Focus and Satisfaction

Exceeding Expectations: We aim to accurately understand our customers' needs and provide solutions that exceed their expectations.
Feedback and Complaint Management: We consider customer feedback our most valuable source of information and use it to improve the quality of our services. We are committed to resolving customer complaints quickly and effectively.

Continuous Improvement and Innovation

Efficiency and Effectiveness: We regularly review all our processes and develop more efficient and effective working methods.
Technological Investments: We aim to improve the quality of our products and services by integrating the latest technologies into our business processes.
R&D and Innovation: Through our R&D investments, we continue to develop innovative products and take a leading role in the sector.

Environmental Awareness and Sustainability

Environmental Responsibility: To minimize the environmental impact of our production processes, we use environmentally friendly and sustainable resources.
Energy and Waste Management: We aim to optimize our energy consumption, recycle our waste, and reduce our environmental footprint.
Green Product Development: We contribute to a sustainable future by designing our products with environmentally friendly materials.

Employee Development and Safety

Training and Development: We enhance our employees' skills through continuous training and support their personal and professional development.
Occupational Health and Safety: To ensure the highest level of safety for our employees, we provide a work environment that fully complies with occupational health and safety standards.
Employee Satisfaction: We view employee satisfaction as a cornerstone of our business success and we continuously strive to improve it.

Legal Compliance and Ethical Values

Legal and Regulatory Compliance: We conduct our operations in full compliance with national and international legal regulations and industry regulations.
Ethical Business Principles: We adopt high ethical standards in our business processes and demonstrate an approach based on honesty, transparency, and trust in our relationships with all our stakeholders.

Stakeholder Collaboration and Social Responsibility

Supplier and Partner Relationships: We develop sustainable, mutually trusting relationships with our suppliers and business partners. By sharing our common values, we build long-term collaborations.
Contribution to Society: By participating in social responsibility projects, we aim to contribute to the well-being of society and create a positive social impact.

Quality Documents and Certificates

International Standards: We ensure compliance with international standards such as ISO 9001, ISO 10002, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001, and we continuously update our work in line with these certifications.
TS EN 1176 – 1,2,3,4,5,6 and 11 Model-Based TS EN Certificates: We fully comply with safety standards for children's playgrounds and equipment.
TS 7941: We manufacture according to the quality standards specified for seating benches.
We manufacture according to TS EN 16630: the necessary safety and quality standards for stationary outdoor exercise equipment.
TS 13858: We fully implement the quality and safety standards applicable to gazebos.
TS 13735: We meticulously adhere to national quality standards in the production of waste bins.
Quality Assurance: To ensure the quality of our products and services, we implement rigorous quality control processes at every stage.

In conclusion, at Umut Design and Urban Equipment, we consider quality, customer satisfaction, employee safety, and environmental responsibility as a whole; and in line with these values, we conduct our business with the principle of excellence. Our quality policy guides us in fulfilling our responsibilities to all our stakeholders.
